LCOV - code coverage report
Current view: top level - backend/utils/cache - ts_cache.c (source / functions) Coverage Total Hit
Test: coverage_filtered.info Lines: 25.0 % 220 55
Test Date: 2026-06-06 04:44:07 Functions: 37.5 % 8 3 

            Line data    Source code
       1              : /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------
       2              :  *
       3              :  * ts_cache.c
       4              :  *        Tsearch related object caches.
       5              :  *
       6              :  * Tsearch performance is very sensitive to performance of parsers,
       7              :  * dictionaries and mapping, so lookups should be cached as much
       8              :  * as possible.
       9              :  *
      10              :  * Once a backend has created a cache entry for a particular TS object OID,
      11              :  * the cache entry will exist for the life of the backend; hence it is
      12              :  * safe to hold onto a pointer to the cache entry while doing things that
      13              :  * might result in recognizing a cache invalidation.  Beware however that
      14              :  * subsidiary information might be deleted and reallocated somewhere else
      15              :  * if a cache inval and reval happens!  This does not look like it will be
      16              :  * a big problem as long as parser and dictionary methods do not attempt
      17              :  * any database access.
      18              :  *
      19              :  *
      20              :  * Copyright (c) 2006-2020, PostgreSQL Global Development Group
      21              :  *
      22              :  * IDENTIFICATION
      23              :  *        src/backend/utils/cache/ts_cache.c
      24              :  *
      25              :  *-------------------------------------------------------------------------
      26              :  */
      27              : #include "postgres.h"
      28              : 
      29              : #include "access/genam.h"
      30              : #include "access/htup_details.h"
      31              : #include "access/table.h"
      32              : #include "access/xact.h"
      33              : #include "catalog/indexing.h"
      34              : #include "catalog/namespace.h"
      35              : #include "catalog/pg_ts_config.h"
      36              : #include "catalog/pg_ts_config_map.h"
      37              : #include "catalog/pg_ts_dict.h"
      38              : #include "catalog/pg_ts_parser.h"
      39              : #include "catalog/pg_ts_template.h"
      40              : #include "commands/defrem.h"
      41              : #include "miscadmin.h"
      42              : #include "tsearch/ts_cache.h"
      43              : #include "utils/builtins.h"
      44              : #include "utils/catcache.h"
      45              : #include "utils/fmgroids.h"
      46              : #include "utils/inval.h"
      47              : #include "utils/lsyscache.h"
      48              : #include "utils/memutils.h"
      49              : #include "utils/regproc.h"
      50              : #include "utils/syscache.h"
      51              : 
      52              : 
      53              : /*
      54              :  * MAXTOKENTYPE/MAXDICTSPERTT are arbitrary limits on the workspace size
      55              :  * used in lookup_ts_config_cache().  We could avoid hardwiring a limit
      56              :  * by making the workspace dynamically enlargeable, but it seems unlikely
      57              :  * to be worth the trouble.
      58              :  */
      59              : #define MAXTOKENTYPE    256
      60              : #define MAXDICTSPERTT   100
      61              : 
      62              : 
      63              : static HTAB *TSParserCacheHash = NULL;
      64              : static TSParserCacheEntry *lastUsedParser = NULL;
      65              : 
      66              : static HTAB *TSDictionaryCacheHash = NULL;
      67              : static TSDictionaryCacheEntry *lastUsedDictionary = NULL;
      68              : 
      69              : static HTAB *TSConfigCacheHash = NULL;
      70              : static TSConfigCacheEntry *lastUsedConfig = NULL;
      71              : 
      72              : /*
      73              :  * GUC default_text_search_config, and a cache of the current config's OID
      74              :  */
      75              : char       *TSCurrentConfig = NULL;
      76              : 
      77              : static Oid      TSCurrentConfigCache = InvalidOid;
      78              : 
      79              : 
      80              : /*
      81              :  * We use this syscache callback to detect when a visible change to a TS
      82              :  * catalog entry has been made, by either our own backend or another one.
      83              :  *
      84              :  * In principle we could just flush the specific cache entry that changed,
      85              :  * but given that TS configuration changes are probably infrequent, it
      86              :  * doesn't seem worth the trouble to determine that; we just flush all the
      87              :  * entries of the related hash table.
      88              :  *
      89              :  * We can use the same function for all TS caches by passing the hash
      90              :  * table address as the "arg".
      91              :  */
      92              : static void
      93            0 : InvalidateTSCacheCallBack(Datum arg, int cacheid, uint32 hashvalue)
      94              : {
      95            0 :         HTAB       *hash = (HTAB *) DatumGetPointer(arg);
      96              :         HASH_SEQ_STATUS status;
      97              :         TSAnyCacheEntry *entry;
      98              : 
      99            0 :         hash_seq_init(&status, hash);
     100            0 :         while ((entry = (TSAnyCacheEntry *) hash_seq_search(&status)) != NULL)
     101            0 :                 entry->isvalid = false;
     102              : 
     103              :         /* Also invalidate the current-config cache if it's pg_ts_config */
     104            0 :         if (hash == TSConfigCacheHash)
     105            0 :                 TSCurrentConfigCache = InvalidOid;
     106            0 : }
     107              : 
     108              : /*
     109              :  * Fetch parser cache entry
     110              :  */
     111              : TSParserCacheEntry *
     112          198 : lookup_ts_parser_cache(Oid prsId)
     113              : {
     114              :         TSParserCacheEntry *entry;
     115              : 
     116          198 :         if (TSParserCacheHash == NULL)
     117              :         {
     118              :                 /* First time through: initialize the hash table */
     119              :                 HASHCTL         ctl;
     120              : 
     121           42 :                 MemSet(&ctl, 0, sizeof(ctl));
     122            3 :                 ctl.keysize = sizeof(Oid);
     123            3 :                 ctl.entrysize = sizeof(TSParserCacheEntry);
     124            3 :                 TSParserCacheHash = hash_create("Tsearch parser cache", 4,
     125              :                                                                                 &ctl, HASH_ELEM | HASH_BLOBS);
     126              :                 /* Flush cache on pg_ts_parser changes */
     127            3 :                 CacheRegisterSyscacheCallback(TSPARSEROID, InvalidateTSCacheCallBack,
     128              :                                                                           PointerGetDatum(TSParserCacheHash));
     129              : 
     130              :                 /* Also make sure CacheMemoryContext exists */
     131            3 :                 if (!CacheMemoryContext)
     132            0 :                         CreateCacheMemoryContext();
     133              :         }
     134              : 
     135              :         /* Check single-entry cache */
     136          198 :         if (lastUsedParser && lastUsedParser->prsId == prsId &&
     137          195 :                 lastUsedParser->isvalid)
     138          195 :                 return lastUsedParser;
     139              : 
     140              :         /* Try to look up an existing entry */
     141            3 :         entry = (TSParserCacheEntry *) hash_search(TSParserCacheHash,
     142              :                                                                                            (void *) &prsId,
     143              :                                                                                            HASH_FIND, NULL);
     144            3 :         if (entry == NULL || !entry->isvalid)
     145              :         {
     146              :                 /*
     147              :                  * If we didn't find one, we want to make one. But first look up the
     148              :                  * object to be sure the OID is real.
     149              :                  */
     150              :                 HeapTuple       tp;
     151              :                 Form_pg_ts_parser prs;
     152              : 
     153            3 :                 tp = SearchSysCache1(TSPARSEROID, ObjectIdGetDatum(prsId));
     154            3 :                 if (!HeapTupleIsValid(tp))
     155            0 :                         elog(ERROR, "cache lookup failed for text search parser %u",
     156              :                                  prsId);
     157            3 :                 prs = (Form_pg_ts_parser) GETSTRUCT(tp);
     158              : 
     159              :                 /*
     160              :                  * Sanity checks
     161              :                  */
     162            3 :                 if (!OidIsValid(prs->prsstart))
     163            0 :                         elog(ERROR, "text search parser %u has no prsstart method", prsId);
     164            3 :                 if (!OidIsValid(prs->prstoken))
     165            0 :                         elog(ERROR, "text search parser %u has no prstoken method", prsId);
     166            3 :                 if (!OidIsValid(prs->prsend))
     167            0 :                         elog(ERROR, "text search parser %u has no prsend method", prsId);
     168              : 
     169            3 :                 if (entry == NULL)
     170              :                 {
     171              :                         bool            found;
     172              : 
     173              :                         /* Now make the cache entry */
     174              :                         entry = (TSParserCacheEntry *)
     175            3 :                                 hash_search(TSParserCacheHash,
     176              :                                                         (void *) &prsId,
     177              :                                                         HASH_ENTER, &found);
     178              :                         Assert(!found);         /* it wasn't there a moment ago */
     179              :                 }
     180              : 
     181           87 :                 MemSet(entry, 0, sizeof(TSParserCacheEntry));
     182            3 :                 entry->prsId = prsId;
     183            3 :                 entry->startOid = prs->prsstart;
     184            3 :                 entry->tokenOid = prs->prstoken;
     185            3 :                 entry->endOid = prs->prsend;
     186            3 :                 entry->headlineOid = prs->prsheadline;
     187            3 :                 entry->lextypeOid = prs->prslextype;
     188              : 
     189            3 :                 ReleaseSysCache(tp);
     190              : 
     191            3 :                 fmgr_info_cxt(entry->startOid, &entry->prsstart, CacheMemoryContext);
     192            3 :                 fmgr_info_cxt(entry->tokenOid, &entry->prstoken, CacheMemoryContext);
     193            3 :                 fmgr_info_cxt(entry->endOid, &entry->prsend, CacheMemoryContext);
     194            3 :                 if (OidIsValid(entry->headlineOid))
     195            3 :                         fmgr_info_cxt(entry->headlineOid, &entry->prsheadline,
     196              :                                                   CacheMemoryContext);
     197              : 
     198            3 :                 entry->isvalid = true;
     199              :         }
     200              : 
     201            3 :         lastUsedParser = entry;
     202              : 
     203            3 :         return entry;
     204              : }
     205              : 
     206              : /*
     207              :  * Fetch dictionary cache entry
     208              :  */

     210            0 : lookup_ts_dictionary_cache(Oid dictId)

     219            0 :                 MemSet(&ctl, 0, sizeof(ctl));

     221            0 :                 ctl.entrysize = sizeof(TSDictionaryCacheEntry);

     223              :                                                                                         &ctl, HASH_ELEM | HASH_BLOBS);
     224              :                 /* Flush cache on pg_ts_dict and pg_ts_template changes */

     227            0 :                 CacheRegisterSyscacheCallback(TSTEMPLATEOID, InvalidateTSCacheCallBack,

     234              :

     238            0 :                 return lastUsedDictionary;
     239              : 
     240              :         /* Try to look up an existing entry */

     267              : 
     268              :                 /*

     272            0 :                                                                  ObjectIdGetDatum(dict->dicttemplate));

     278              :                 /*

     285            0 :                 if (entry == NULL)
     286              :                 {
     287              :                         bool            found;
     288              :

     293              :                                                         HASH_ENTER, &found);
     294              :                         Assert(!found);         /* it wasn't there a moment ago */
     295              : 
     296              :                         /* Create private memory context the first time through */

     298              :                                                                                         "TS dictionary",
     299              :                                                                                         ALLOCSET_SMALL_SIZES);
     300            0 :                         MemoryContextCopyAndSetIdentifier(saveCtx, NameStr(dict->dictname));
     301              :                 }
     302              :                 else
     303              :                 {
     304              :                         /* Clear the existing entry's private context */

     306              :                         /* Don't let context's ident pointer dangle while we reset it */

     308            0 :                         MemoryContextReset(saveCtx);
     309            0 :                         MemoryContextCopyAndSetIdentifier(saveCtx, NameStr(dict->dictname));
     310              :                 }
     311              : 
     312            0 :                 MemSet(entry, 0, sizeof(TSDictionaryCacheEntry));
     313            0 :                 entry->dictId = dictId;
     314            0 :                 entry->dictCtx = saveCtx;

     316            0 :                 entry->lexizeOid = template->tmpllexize;
     317              : 
     318            0 :                 if (OidIsValid(template->tmplinit))

     321              :                         Datum           opt;
     322              :                         bool            isnull;
     323              :                         MemoryContext oldcontext;
     324              : 
     325              :                         /*
     326              :                          * Init method runs in dictionary's private memory context, and we
     327              :                          * make sure the options are stored there too
     328              :                          */
     329            0 :                         oldcontext = MemoryContextSwitchTo(entry->dictCtx);
     330              : 
     331            0 :                         opt = SysCacheGetAttr(TSDICTOID, tpdict,
     332              :                                                                   Anum_pg_ts_dict_dictinitoption,
     333              :                                                                   &isnull);
     334            0 :                         if (isnull)
     335            0 :                                 dictoptions = NIL;
     336              :                         else
     337            0 :                                 dictoptions = deserialize_deflist(opt);
     338              : 
     339            0 :                         entry->dictData =
     340            0 :                                 DatumGetPointer(OidFunctionCall1(template->tmplinit,

     342              : 
     343            0 :                         MemoryContextSwitchTo(oldcontext);
     344              :                 }
     345              : 
     346            0 :                 ReleaseSysCache(tptmpl);
     347            0 :                 ReleaseSysCache(tpdict);

     349            0 :                 fmgr_info_cxt(entry->lexizeOid, &entry->lexize, entry->dictCtx);

     351            0 :                 entry->isvalid = true;
     352              :         }

     354            0 :         lastUsedDictionary = entry;
     355              :

     358              : 
     359              : /*
     360              :  * Initialize config cache and prepare callbacks.  This is split out of
     361              :  * lookup_ts_config_cache because we need to activate the callback before
     362              :  * caching TSCurrentConfigCache, too.
     363              :  */
     364              : static void
     365            0 : init_ts_config_cache(void)
     366              : {
     367              :         HASHCTL         ctl;
     368              : 
     369            0 :         MemSet(&ctl, 0, sizeof(ctl));
     370            0 :         ctl.keysize = sizeof(Oid);
     371            0 :         ctl.entrysize = sizeof(TSConfigCacheEntry);
     372            0 :         TSConfigCacheHash = hash_create("Tsearch configuration cache", 16,
     373              :                                                                         &ctl, HASH_ELEM | HASH_BLOBS);
     374              :         /* Flush cache on pg_ts_config and pg_ts_config_map changes */
     375            0 :         CacheRegisterSyscacheCallback(TSCONFIGOID, InvalidateTSCacheCallBack,
     376              :                                                                   PointerGetDatum(TSConfigCacheHash));
     377            0 :         CacheRegisterSyscacheCallback(TSCONFIGMAP, InvalidateTSCacheCallBack,
     378              :                                                                   PointerGetDatum(TSConfigCacheHash));
     379              : 
     380              :         /* Also make sure CacheMemoryContext exists */
     381            0 :         if (!CacheMemoryContext)
     382            0 :                 CreateCacheMemoryContext();
     383            0 : }
     384              : 
     385              : /*
     386              :  * Fetch configuration cache entry
     387              :  */
     388              : TSConfigCacheEntry *
     389            0 : lookup_ts_config_cache(Oid cfgId)
     390              : {
     391              :         TSConfigCacheEntry *entry;
     392              : 
     393            0 :         if (TSConfigCacheHash == NULL)
     394              :         {
     395              :                 /* First time through: initialize the hash table */
     396            0 :                 init_ts_config_cache();
     397              :         }
     398              : 
     399              :         /* Check single-entry cache */
     400            0 :         if (lastUsedConfig && lastUsedConfig->cfgId == cfgId &&
     401            0 :                 lastUsedConfig->isvalid)
     402            0 :                 return lastUsedConfig;
     403              : 
     404              :         /* Try to look up an existing entry */
     405            0 :         entry = (TSConfigCacheEntry *) hash_search(TSConfigCacheHash,
     406              :                                                                                            (void *) &cfgId,
     407              :                                                                                            HASH_FIND, NULL);
     408            0 :         if (entry == NULL || !entry->isvalid)
     409              :         {
     410              :                 /*
     411              :                  * If we didn't find one, we want to make one. But first look up the
     412              :                  * object to be sure the OID is real.
     413              :                  */
     414              :                 HeapTuple       tp;
     415              :                 Form_pg_ts_config cfg;
     416              :                 Relation        maprel;
     417              :                 Relation        mapidx;
     418              :                 ScanKeyData mapskey;
     419              :                 SysScanDesc mapscan;
     420              :                 HeapTuple       maptup;
     421              :                 ListDictionary maplists[MAXTOKENTYPE + 1];
     422              :                 Oid                     mapdicts[MAXDICTSPERTT];
     423              :                 int                     maxtokentype;
     424              :                 int                     ndicts;
     425              :                 int                     i;
     426              : 
     427            0 :                 tp = SearchSysCache1(TSCONFIGOID, ObjectIdGetDatum(cfgId));
     428            0 :                 if (!HeapTupleIsValid(tp))
     429            0 :                         elog(ERROR, "cache lookup failed for text search configuration %u",
     430              :                                  cfgId);
     431            0 :                 cfg = (Form_pg_ts_config) GETSTRUCT(tp);
     432              : 
     433              :                 /*
     434              :                  * Sanity checks
     435              :                  */
     436            0 :                 if (!OidIsValid(cfg->cfgparser))
     437            0 :                         elog(ERROR, "text search configuration %u has no parser", cfgId);
     438              : 
     439            0 :                 if (entry == NULL)
     440              :                 {
     441              :                         bool            found;
     442              : 
     443              :                         /* Now make the cache entry */
     444              :                         entry = (TSConfigCacheEntry *)
     445            0 :                                 hash_search(TSConfigCacheHash,
     446              :                                                         (void *) &cfgId,
     447              :                                                         HASH_ENTER, &found);
     448              :                         Assert(!found);         /* it wasn't there a moment ago */
     449              :                 }
     450              :                 else
     451              :                 {
     452              :                         /* Cleanup old contents */
     453            0 :                         if (entry->map)
     454              :                         {
     455            0 :                                 for (i = 0; i < entry->lenmap; i++)
     456            0 :                                         if (entry->map[i].dictIds)
     457            0 :                                                 pfree(entry->map[i].dictIds);
     458            0 :                                 pfree(entry->map);
     459              :                         }
     460              :                 }
     461              : 
     462            0 :                 MemSet(entry, 0, sizeof(TSConfigCacheEntry));
     463            0 :                 entry->cfgId = cfgId;
     464            0 :                 entry->prsId = cfg->cfgparser;
     465              : 
     466            0 :                 ReleaseSysCache(tp);
     467              : 
     468              :                 /*
     469              :                  * Scan pg_ts_config_map to gather dictionary list for each token type
     470              :                  *
     471              :                  * Because the index is on (mapcfg, maptokentype, mapseqno), we will
     472              :                  * see the entries in maptokentype order, and in mapseqno order for
     473              :                  * each token type, even though we didn't explicitly ask for that.
     474              :                  */
     475            0 :                 MemSet(maplists, 0, sizeof(maplists));
     476            0 :                 maxtokentype = 0;
     477            0 :                 ndicts = 0;
     478              : 
     479            0 :                 ScanKeyInit(&mapskey,
     480              :                                         Anum_pg_ts_config_map_mapcfg,
     481              :                                         BTEqualStrategyNumber, F_OIDEQ,
     482              :                                         ObjectIdGetDatum(cfgId));
     483              : 
     484            0 :                 maprel = table_open(TSConfigMapRelationId, AccessShareLock);
     485            0 :                 mapidx = index_open(TSConfigMapIndexId, AccessShareLock);
     486            0 :                 mapscan = systable_beginscan_ordered(maprel, mapidx,
     487              :                                                                                          NULL, 1, &mapskey);
     488              : 
     489            0 :                 while ((maptup = systable_getnext_ordered(mapscan, ForwardScanDirection)) != NULL)
     490              :                 {
     491            0 :                         Form_pg_ts_config_map cfgmap = (Form_pg_ts_config_map) GETSTRUCT(maptup);
     492            0 :                         int                     toktype = cfgmap->maptokentype;
     493              : 
     494            0 :                         if (toktype <= 0 || toktype > MAXTOKENTYPE)
     495            0 :                                 elog(ERROR, "maptokentype value %d is out of range", toktype);
     496            0 :                         if (toktype < maxtokentype)
     497            0 :                                 elog(ERROR, "maptokentype entries are out of order");
     498            0 :                         if (toktype > maxtokentype)
     499              :                         {
     500              :                                 /* starting a new token type, but first save the prior data */
     501            0 :                                 if (ndicts > 0)
     502              :                                 {
     503            0 :                                         maplists[maxtokentype].len = ndicts;
     504            0 :                                         maplists[maxtokentype].dictIds = (Oid *)
     505            0 :                                                 MemoryContextAlloc(CacheMemoryContext,
     506              :                                                                                    sizeof(Oid) * ndicts);
     507            0 :                                         memcpy(maplists[maxtokentype].dictIds, mapdicts,
     508              :                                                    sizeof(Oid) * ndicts);
     509              :                                 }
     510            0 :                                 maxtokentype = toktype;
     511            0 :                                 mapdicts[0] = cfgmap->mapdict;
     512            0 :                                 ndicts = 1;
     513              :                         }
     514              :                         else
     515              :                         {
     516              :                                 /* continuing data for current token type */
     517            0 :                                 if (ndicts >= MAXDICTSPERTT)
     518            0 :                                         elog(ERROR, "too many pg_ts_config_map entries for one token type");
     519            0 :                                 mapdicts[ndicts++] = cfgmap->mapdict;
     520              :                         }
     521              :                 }
     522              : 
     523            0 :                 systable_endscan_ordered(mapscan);
     524            0 :                 index_close(mapidx, AccessShareLock);
     525            0 :                 table_close(maprel, AccessShareLock);
     526              : 
     527            0 :                 if (ndicts > 0)
     528              :                 {
     529              :                         /* save the last token type's dictionaries */
     530            0 :                         maplists[maxtokentype].len = ndicts;
     531            0 :                         maplists[maxtokentype].dictIds = (Oid *)
     532            0 :                                 MemoryContextAlloc(CacheMemoryContext,
     533              :                                                                    sizeof(Oid) * ndicts);
     534            0 :                         memcpy(maplists[maxtokentype].dictIds, mapdicts,
     535              :                                    sizeof(Oid) * ndicts);
     536              :                         /* and save the overall map */
     537            0 :                         entry->lenmap = maxtokentype + 1;
     538            0 :                         entry->map = (ListDictionary *)
     539            0 :                                 MemoryContextAlloc(CacheMemoryContext,
     540            0 :                                                                    sizeof(ListDictionary) * entry->lenmap);
     541            0 :                         memcpy(entry->map, maplists,
     542            0 :                                    sizeof(ListDictionary) * entry->lenmap);
     543              :                 }
     544              : 
     545            0 :                 entry->isvalid = true;
     546              :         }
     547              : 
     548            0 :         lastUsedConfig = entry;
     549              : 
     550            0 :         return entry;
     551              : }
     552              : 
     553              : 
     554              : /*---------------------------------------------------
     555              :  * GUC variable "default_text_search_config"
     556              :  *---------------------------------------------------
     557              :  */
     558              : 
     559              : Oid
     560            0 : getTSCurrentConfig(bool emitError)
     561              : {
     562              :         /* if we have a cached value, return it */
     563            0 :         if (OidIsValid(TSCurrentConfigCache))
     564            0 :                 return TSCurrentConfigCache;
     565              : 
     566              :         /* fail if GUC hasn't been set up yet */
     567            0 :         if (TSCurrentConfig == NULL || *TSCurrentConfig == '\0')
     568              :         {
     569            0 :                 if (emitError)
     570            0 :                         elog(ERROR, "text search configuration isn't set");
     571              :                 else
     572            0 :                         return InvalidOid;
     573              :         }
     574              : 
     575            0 :         if (TSConfigCacheHash == NULL)
     576              :         {
     577              :                 /* First time through: initialize the tsconfig inval callback */
     578            0 :                 init_ts_config_cache();
     579              :         }
     580              : 
     581              :         /* Look up the config */
     582            0 :         TSCurrentConfigCache =
     583            0 :                 get_ts_config_oid(stringToQualifiedNameList(TSCurrentConfig),
     584            0 :                                                   !emitError);
     585              : 
     586            0 :         return TSCurrentConfigCache;
     587              : }
     588              : 
     589              : /* GUC check_hook for default_text_search_config */
     590              : bool
     591           32 : check_TSCurrentConfig(char **newval, void **extra, GucSource source)
     592              : {
     593              :         /*
     594              :          * If we aren't inside a transaction, or connected to a database, we
     595              :          * cannot do the catalog accesses necessary to verify the config name.
     596              :          * Must accept it on faith.
     597              :          */
     598           32 :         if (IsTransactionState() && MyDatabaseId != InvalidOid)
     599              :         {
     600              :                 Oid                     cfgId;
     601              :                 HeapTuple       tuple;
     602              :                 Form_pg_ts_config cfg;
     603              :                 char       *buf;
     604              : 
     605            2 :                 cfgId = get_ts_config_oid(stringToQualifiedNameList(*newval), true);
     606              : 
     607              :                 /*
     608              :                  * When source == PGC_S_TEST, don't throw a hard error for a
     609              :                  * nonexistent configuration, only a NOTICE.  See comments in guc.h.
     610              :                  */
     611            2 :                 if (!OidIsValid(cfgId))
     612              :                 {
     613            0 :                         if (source == PGC_S_TEST)
     614              :                         {
     615            0 :                                 ereport(NOTICE,
     616              :                                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_UNDEFINED_OBJECT),
     617              :                                                  errmsg("text search configuration \"%s\" does not exist", *newval)));
     618            0 :                                 return true;
     619              :                         }
     620              :                         else
     621            0 :                                 return false;
     622              :                 }
     623              : 
     624              :                 /*
     625              :                  * Modify the actually stored value to be fully qualified, to ensure
     626              :                  * later changes of search_path don't affect it.
     627              :                  */
     628            2 :                 tuple = SearchSysCache1(TSCONFIGOID, ObjectIdGetDatum(cfgId));
     629            2 :                 if (!HeapTupleIsValid(tuple))
     630            0 :                         elog(ERROR, "cache lookup failed for text search configuration %u",
     631              :                                  cfgId);
     632            2 :                 cfg = (Form_pg_ts_config) GETSTRUCT(tuple);
     633              : 
     634            2 :                 buf = quote_qualified_identifier(get_namespace_name(cfg->cfgnamespace),
     635            2 :                                                                                  NameStr(cfg->cfgname));
     636              : 
     637            2 :                 ReleaseSysCache(tuple);
     638              : 
     639              :                 /* GUC wants it malloc'd not palloc'd */
     640            2 :                 free(*newval);
     641            2 :                 *newval = strdup(buf);
     642            2 :                 pfree(buf);
     643            2 :                 if (!*newval)
     644            0 :                         return false;
     645              :         }
     646              : 
     647           32 :         return true;
     648              : }
     649              : 
     650              : /* GUC assign_hook for default_text_search_config */
     651              : void
     652           32 : assign_TSCurrentConfig(const char *newval, void *extra)
     653              : {
     654              :         /* Just reset the cache to force a lookup on first use */
     655           32 :         TSCurrentConfigCache = InvalidOid;
     656           32 : }

Generated by: LCOV version 2.0-1
